title: leontodon laciniatus
intro: Leontodon laciniatus, also known as sawwort, is a perennial flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of sawwort include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues due to its ability to soothe and calm inflammation. Sawwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
